review_title: Anything, Anytime, Anywhere - Least Effort & Maximum Value
description: In my personal life: I keep track of all things that are relevant to my health and/or are relevant to how I live my life (the appointments I make, the activities I do, the results I aim to accomplish). In my professional life: I keep track of strategies, projects, progress, invoices, payments, collaborations... the list goes on and on and on.
author: Frank V.
pros: Through the VobeCustom software I am now able to keep track of ANYTHING that I desire in both my personal and professional life. The amounts of clicks and thus time required is an absolute minimum, as the VobeCustom software allows me to configure things exactly as I like them. There are no limits.
cons: The thing I like least about this software, is that it is not used by EVERYBODY.

review_title: Easy to use Software, easy to connect
description: Vobesoft is the best what happened to me in the last 6 month!
author: Stefan S.
pros: Vobesoft is an eye-opener in "world of CRM/XRM" solotions. I mostly like the structure of the IT, the easyness of working and the friendly helpdesk.
cons: There are a lot of skills in common, i would like if Vobesoft could be approved by local TAX-institutes.

review_title: Easy to use
description: It is easy to use and has all the information you need.
author: Gulsah Y.
pros: Vobesoft is easy to use and has a clean format
cons: The agenda is nog adjustable with outlook.

review_title: Review Pim de Boere
description: With Vobesoft we have an excellent customer tracking system in-house, many options for filtering out and tracking base.
author: Pim D.
pros: Easy to use, both for the user and administrator
cons: Link with other program, as an example the accounting program that we also work with.

description: Good and fast service. They understand what the compnay needs.
author: Wilma B.
pros: Only what we need is in the software and it's easy to expand. Also it's easy to use and I have acces everywhere in the world at any time.
cons: I can't think of anything that is missing or doesn't work the way we want to do.

review_title: My experiences with the tools of Vobesoft
description: We used Vobe Custom for a consulting project for a major German car manufacturer. We were able to quickly explain the benefits to the local employees and they consistently implemented the tool after a short familiarization phase. This helps us to achieve sustainability for our changes and consulting services to the customer
author: Thomas W.
pros: - Fast scalability in the enterprise - Employees learn to handle it quickly - Massive increase in productivity - Easy to use - Very transparent and fair price model - Support from the provider
cons: - A completely German-language interface would allow even more employees to easily use Vobesoft tools. So, overall translation ist very appreciated

review_title: Very easy to use and fully customisable!
description: Positive. It's helped us centralise our ordering, reporting, complaints and customer account approval systems in one central place, where these were previously dealt with in a completely analogue and paper way.
author: Bram D.
pros: Easy integration, no large implementation times as the way of working speaks for itself, and fully customisable. If something you've set up previously doesn't turn out to work, you can change the way the system works yourself to suit the ways of working of your organisation.
cons: Not yet linkable with our ERP system, but hoping to achieve this in the future.

review_title: Easy and convinient.
description: Work process. Less email. Real and actual status. Good overview. Quick decisions.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Easy to work with. It is very effective to get the results you want.
cons: Authorisation. You have make a real good plan to configure the authorisations

review_title: Efficiency Effectiveness Economical Value for money
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: User-friendly, having everything in your own hands. Once you start with it it’s spreading it’s self like a virus in a good way. Makes you think about all not automated processes that you can change using the VobeSoft
cons: Missing some nice to have functionalities

review_title: The core of all processes in one solution
description: We use it for the status of our car park. Connect it to the availibilty for our planning. Measure out complains to perform our quality.
author: frank M.
pros: The flexibility to use. Allmost everything you want you can registrate in VobeSoft.
cons: At the begining it was a little bit hard to find the way in the system because of all the opertunities and features you can use.

review_title: Ease of use experience with VobeSoft
author: Arjun J.
pros: Easy and fast software to use for workflow management, reminder system, storing documents and lead generation.
cons: Till now I have not found any type of disadvantages of the software.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy to use
author: Dennis D.
pros: VobeSoft is flexible, which makes it so that we can adapt it on the spot and to the wishes of our colleagues.
cons: The mail module can use (and is planned for) an update. Furthermore, data visualisation is limited at the moment.

review_title: very useful company tool which is easy to use in short time
description: As we´re still in the initial fase, I just can give positive feedback about the Software. It´s a useful tool so far, especially on management level to be a few clicks all happenings within the company. It´s easy to use and all employees adapted very fast to the problems. As all modules have been adjusted to our needs so far, we are very satisfied
author: Dennis D.
pros: It´s flexibility, easy amendments for company needs, clear and quick overview about happenings in the company
cons: we just started to work with the programm, all difficulties were adapted inmediatly, so no complaints so far
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It makes all look clear!
author: Carlos S.
pros: The cleanliness of the design. It's very intuitive and customisable. I can filter information, to show only what we need.
cons: We need to customise the relevant information to be shown on the pipeflows.

review_title: The real custom solution
author: Jeroen V.
pros: When you first get in contact with VobeSoft they will explain to you that a lot is possible with their software. And they are not lying! VobeSoft gave me the tools to bring my company processes to the next level. No limitations to what I could do with the software. And if I needed a difficult process managed the customer support was there to help me.
cons: There is not much not to like about the software but if I have to be picky it would be the lack of a way to automate the way our website contact form gets transfered to the VobeSoft software.

review_title: Review
description: Fleetmanagement, CRM, Customer complaints, Workflowmanagement, communication platform.
author: Hans D.
pros: Very good software to implement in the organisation as it is possible to customise it yourself.
cons: I cannot think of any cons at the moment, some minor details in the functionalities are not in the program yet. But we were promised that these will be in a next release. We have seen some of these being implementated

review_title: Easy to use and very efficient
author: Philip R.
pros: Easy to work with, very effective, and gets you the results you want.
cons: We just started working with the program, so far there are no complaints.

review_title: Vobesoft for small entertainment businesses
author: Tom V.
pros: Easy to learn, intuitive UI, excellent workflow.
cons: UI may be too simplistic for some users.

review_title: Building my own applications, without progamming
description: We organized all our medical registration for habitants!
author: Joost V.
pros: Very easy to start, as long as you first sketch the relations between forms
cons: No calculating module, they say iT will come shortly

review_title: Perfect functionality
author: Thomas V.
pros: The use of the software is great, also everything is possible in the cloud what makes it easy to work from different locations.
cons: Not applicable

review_title: The solution for many problems
author: Lars B.
pros: The fact, that everything is possible in VobeSoft, which creates a lot of business opportunities.
cons: That customisation is often necessary.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Start-up with a real good product
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Flexibility. A lot of possibilities in one system.
cons: Sometimes you have to search a bit to find what you need.
author_profession: Product owner at Intrasurance Technology Services
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Review
author: Viviën L.
pros: User friendly, great service. I like all of the widgets you can use with it.
cons: Its blue. I don't like blue. I want red.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
